ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (Men, Women, Youth) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the product (Adult, Kid) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., X-SMALL, SMALL, MEDIUM) */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of the size (e.g., 5.5-7.5, 8-10) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Foot Length, Insole Length) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the conversion */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size value for the region */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the converted size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the conversion was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the region */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Primary language code used in the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Placed, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Express, Standard) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order linked to the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
